variants: Kirill Borovikov is a licensed professional in the field of balloon artistry, holding the Balloon Artisan Document. He aims to combine his business and artistic skills, having studied at Zephyrgate Business College, which provided him with a solid foundation. As a committed community member, he serves as the Facilitator of Trillium Music Mentors, helping emerging musicians grow. Kirill has also made his mark in literature, having published works in the Quietbrook Chapbook Series. Additionally, he utilizes the Georgian alphabet in his communications, rounding out his diverse skill set.

Beyond his work as an artisan, he has taken on the role of Facilitator of Trillium Music Mentors to give back to the community through music education. His creative talents extend to writing, with his pieces featured in the Quietbrook Chapbook Series. Kirill is fluent in the Georgian alphabet, which enhances his ability to connect with various audiences.
